content:
Evadus Lite - Can lose focus
Evadus Core - Can NOT lose focus
Evadus+ - Can NOT lose focus

I've thought about adding crypto, would make sense since some users would like the anonymity, haven't done it yet because I don't know jack shit about Crypto.

Paypal is more promising, however because I'm in south africa, not the US, it gets taxed like crazy, and payouts get complicated.

I do have a paypal email if you'd like to use that to pay, however your bank should allow you to use a virtual card (free and no age restriction)

Can you possibly add a paypal / bitcoin payment? this way it'll benefit you, since it will reach out to global customers everywhere. with the current payment options, i can't really make any subscriptions (cause i don't have a credit card yet), and all the available currency is not from my country.

And a question too: If i use the invisible overlay, can it make the original exam app detect focus loss? What about evadus plus too, is the focus loss detectable if i for example went out of the VM and clicked chatgpt on my original browser
